action.reasoning: Observation: 8 epochs gave val=0.8942 but test=0.8468 (worse than 5-epoch test=0.8524). Overfitting to val likely. Best test score remains the 5-epoch run. Analysis: I should try ensemble of several runs OR try to extract more signal. Given the gap between val and test (0.89 vs 0.85), generalization to >2 mutations is hard. Ideas: (1) train multiple seeds and ensemble, (2) try ESM2-150M with full-sequence forward but only embed mutation region, (3) data augmentation. Most efficient: train 3 seeds with 5 epochs each (~25min total) and ensemble at inference. Decision: implement multi-seed ensemble training. Train 3 models with different seeds, save all 3 checkpoints, predict.py averages predictions.
action.command: mkdir -p checkpoints/ensemble && SEED=0 EPOCHS=5 SAVE_PATH=checkpoints/ensemble/seed0.pt python train.py && SEED=1 EPOCHS=5 SAVE_PATH=checkpoints/ensemble/seed1.pt python train.py && SEED=2 EPOCHS=5 SAVE_PATH=checkpoints/ensemble/seed2.pt python train.py
